title: A 10-mile ride turned into a 1,000-mile spiritual quest - Adam Brown
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Adam Brown about a motorcycle journey that became a spiritual quest. The episode explores themes of personal transformation and self-discovery through a 1,000-mile ride that began as a short 10-mile trip.
